title: callicarpa psilocalyx
intro: Callicarpa psilocalyx, also known as the purple bell vine or purple bell flower, is a type of flowering plant in the Lamiaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it has been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Callicarpa psilocalyx include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and act as an antiseptic. Callicarpa psilocalyx can be consumed as a tea, made by infusing the leaves in hot water, or used as a topical application to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
